title: Garlicky Galician Rice Crema Catalana
description: A comforting, keto-friendly Spanish dish featuring garlicky rice paper sheets, blanched in a creamy Crema Catalana sauce.
instructions: Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the granulated sugar, mozzarella cheese, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and vanilla extract together.
Temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring some of the warm cream mixture into the eggs, whisking continuously.
Gradually pour the egg mixture into the saucepan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the milk, cinnamon, and baking powder.
Soak the rice paper sheets in a large bowl of warm water for 5 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Pour some of the Crema Catalana mixture into the bottom of a baking dish, then layer with rice paper sheets, repeating the process three times, finishing with a layer of Crema Catalana on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top layer is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Dust with cinnamon or cocoa powder, if desired.
Serve warm or chilled, depending on your preference.
